frameworks.name: empowerment
frameworks.one_line: intrinsic drive to maximize future options the agent can reach

frameworks.name: intrinsic motivation
frameworks.one_line: exploration without explicit external reward signals

frameworks.name: semantic world knowledge
frameworks.one_line: prior knowledge shapes which combinations agents try

core_question: What drives human exploration in a large, richly structured combinatorial environment without explicit rewards?
key_assumptions: exploration choices reflect underlying motivational drives
empowerment can be operationalized as creating objects that unlock further objects
semantic content of the environment can be manipulated independently of its structure
manipulations: semantic version vs. semantics-stripped version of the game
key_findings: players preferentially create objects that empower further creation
the empowerment drive disappears when recognizable semantics are removed
interpretations: empowerment is a potent intrinsic motivator in richly structured domains lacking explicit reward
world knowledge guides exploration by linking semantics to empowerment
